name: replies
description: Manage replies — creates a reply to a comment. for more information, see [manage comments and replies](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/guides/manage-comments), lists a comment's replies. for more information, see [manage comments and replies](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/guides/manage-comments), gets a reply by id. for more information, see [manage comments and replies](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/guides/manage-comments). Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
